Likely to purchase.

The concept of a game that focuses on building a lasting legacy across generations presents an exceptionally engaging proposition. The idea of choices having significant, visible ripples through time, influencing a community and its environment, offers a deep sense of purpose and connection that is quite compelling. The nurturing aspect, especially with the garden system impacting the landscape over time, adds a unique layer of emergent storytelling and personal investment. This promises an experience that goes beyond typical gameplay, fostering a profound emotional resonance and a satisfying, enduring impact.
